136: // Replace shape.broadcast with a shape if it's statically known.
137: class BroadcastOpLowering final
138:     : public mlir::OpRewritePattern<shape::BroadcastOp> {
139:  public:
140:   explicit BroadcastOpLowering(MLIRContext* ctx) : OpRewritePattern(ctx) {}
141: 
142:   LogicalResult matchAndRewrite(shape::BroadcastOp op,
143:                                 mlir::PatternRewriter& rewriter) const override;
144: };
145: 
146: // Returns a shape tensor if the shapes can be broadcasted to a known shape.
147: // Will either return one of the shapes or a generated mix of the shapes.
148: llvm::Optional<Value> simplifyBroadcast(ShapeComponentAnalysis& analysis,
149:                                         ValueRange shapes, Location loc,
150:                                         OpBuilder* builder) {
151:   // First find the input shape with the largest rank.
152:   SmallVector<ArrayRef<ShapeComponentAnalysis::SymbolicExpr>> shapes_found;
153:   size_t maxRank = 0;
154:   for (const auto &shape : llvm::enumerate(shapes)) {
155:     auto found_shape = analysis.GetValueInfo(shape.value());
156:     if (!found_shape) return {};
157:     shapes_found.push_back(*found_shape);
158:     maxRank = std::max(maxRank, found_shape->size());
159:   }
160: 
161:   SmallVector<const ShapeComponentAnalysis::SymbolicExpr*> joined_dimensions(
162:       maxRank);
163:   SmallVector<std::pair<Value, int64_t>> shape_and_rank_for_dim(maxRank);
164:   for (const auto &shape : llvm::enumerate(shapes_found)) {
165:     for (const auto &dim : llvm::enumerate(llvm::reverse(shape.value()))) {
166:       // 1 dimensions don't contribute to the final result.
167:       if (dim.value().isConstant(1)) continue;
168:       // If it's not a 1 dimension it will be present in the result. Remember
169:       // where it came from.
170:       auto index = maxRank - dim.index() - 1;
171:       if (!joined_dimensions[index]) {
172:         joined_dimensions[index] = &dim.value();
173:         shape_and_rank_for_dim[index] =
174:             std::make_pair(shapes[shape.index()], shape.value().size());
175:         continue;
176:       }
177:       // Bail if the dimensions are neither equal nor 1.
178:       if (*joined_dimensions[index] != dim.value()) return {};
179:     }
180:   }
181:   // If the output is the same as one of the inputs just return that.
182:   if (llvm::is_splat(shape_and_rank_for_dim) &&
183:       shape_and_rank_for_dim[0].first) {
184:     return shape_and_rank_for_dim[0].first;
185:   }
186:   // Otherwise rematerialize the shape from the pieces we have.
187:   SmallVector<Value> elements;
188:   for (int i = 0; i != maxRank; ++i) {
189:     // 1 dimensions are filtered above, recreate the constant.
190:     if (!shape_and_rank_for_dim[i].first) {
191:       auto one = builder->getIntegerAttr(
192:           shapes[0].getType().cast<RankedTensorType>().getElementType(), 1);
193:       elements.push_back(builder->create<ConstantOp>(loc, one));
194:       continue;
195:     }
196:     // Extract from one of the shapes, accounting for the reverse indexing
197:     // performed by broadcast.
198:     Value index = builder->create<ConstantIndexOp>(
199:         loc, i - maxRank + shape_and_rank_for_dim[i].second);

backport_result:
  status: success
  patch: |
    diff --git a/tensorflow/compiler/mlir/tfrt/jit/transforms/tf_cpurt_symbolic_shape_optimization.cc b/tensorflow/compiler/mlir/tfrt/jit/transforms/tf_cpurt_symbolic_shape_optimization.cc
    index 628141a6cd..0a8fc42e80 100644
    --- a/tensorflow/compiler/mlir/tfrt/jit/transforms/tf_cpurt_symbolic_shape_optimization.cc
    +++ b/tensorflow/compiler/mlir/tfrt/jit/transforms/tf_cpurt_symbolic_shape_optimization.cc
    @@ -157,6 +157,10 @@ llvm::Optional<Value> simplifyBroadcast(ShapeComponentAnalysis& analysis,
         shapes_found.push_back(*found_shape);
         maxRank = std::max(maxRank, found_shape->size());
       }
    +  if (maxRank == 0) {
    +    return Value(builder->create<tensor::FromElementsOp>(
    +        loc, shapes[0].getType(), SmallVector<Value>()));
    +  }
     
       SmallVector<const ShapeComponentAnalysis::SymbolicExpr*> joined_dimensions(
           maxRank);
    diff --git a/tensorflow/compiler/mlir/tfrt/python_tests/regression_tests/scalar_broadcast.mlir b/tensorflow/compiler/mlir/tfrt/python_tests/regression_tests/scalar_broadcast.mlir
    new file mode 100644
    index 0000000000..f4062d2132
    --- /dev/null
    +++ b/tensorflow/compiler/mlir/tfrt/python_tests/regression_tests/scalar_broadcast.mlir
    @@ -0,0 +1,11 @@
    +builtin.func @test(%V__0 : tensor<i1> { python_test_attrs.static_type = tensor<i1> }, %V__1 : tensor<f32> { python_test_attrs.static_type = tensor<f32> }, %V__2 : tensor<f32> { python_test_attrs.static_type = tensor<f32> }) -> tensor<f32> {
    +  %0 = "tf.Cast"(%V__0) : (tensor<i1>) -> tensor<i1>
    +  %1 = "tf.Selu"(%V__2) : (tensor<f32>) -> tensor<f32>
    +  %2 = "tf.NextAfter"(%1, %V__2) : (tensor<f32>, tensor<f32>) -> tensor<f32>
    +  %3 = "tf.Elu"(%2) : (tensor<f32>) -> tensor<f32>
    +  %4 = "tf.Cosh"(%3) : (tensor<f32>) -> tensor<f32>
    +  %5 = "tf.Elu"(%4) : (tensor<f32>) -> tensor<f32>
    +  %6 = "tf.Div"(%V__1, %5) : (tensor<f32>, tensor<f32>) -> tensor<f32>
    +  %7 = "tf.Select"(%0, %6, %V__1) : (tensor<i1>, tensor<f32>, tensor<f32>) -> tensor<f32>
    +  return %7 : tensor<f32>
    +}
  notes: >
    Added the scalar-rank broadcast fast path and regression MLIR test; validated the source hunk in hunk mode against the target base.
